pageTitle: ZZZ — Which agent would be your ideal match?
metaDesc: Discover which Zenless Zone Zero female agent would be your ideal match. A personality-based compatibility quiz.
lcdTicker: ))) HOLLOW DATA ANALYSIS — COMPATIBILITY SCAN ACTIVE — NEW ERIDU AGENT DATABASE — PHAETHON SYSTEMS — PROXY INTERFACE ACTIVE ))) HOLLOW DATA ANALYSIS — COMPATIBILITY SCAN ACTIVE
lcdBottom: PHAETHON  )  COMPATIBILITY ANALYSIS IN PROGRESS  )  NEW ERIDU DATABASE  )  SCANNING PROFILE  )  SYSTEM ONLINE
introDesc: The Hollow Data Analytics system will process your profile and cross-reference it with the active female agent database of New Eridu. There are no right or wrong answers — there is only compatibility.
compatHigh: The connection between you is almost instantaneous. Your values, energies, and visions of the world align naturally and deeply — as if the data was always destined to match.
compatMedHigh: There's solid chemistry between you. It may take time to fully understand each other, but the foundation is more than promising — and worth every second.
compatMedLow: Compatibility exists, though it demands mutual effort. Your differences can become something compelling if you're both willing to meet halfway.
compatLow: You're polar opposites — which can ignite either fire or friction depending on the moment. Not impossible, but undeniably a challenge.
popupDesc: You had an analysis in progress (question {num}/{total}). Do you want to pick up where you left off?
